headline: Humana Just Got a Massive Upgrade From Deutsche Bank: Price Target Nearly Doubles to $441
summary: Deutsche Bank just delivered one of the most aggressive analyst upgrades of 2026 on Humana (NYSE:HUM), lifting the managed care giant to Buy from Hold while nearly doubling its price target to $441 from $235. The move signals that one of Wall Street’s more cautious voices now sees a fundamental reset in the Humana franchise. ... Humana Just Got a Massive Upgrade From Deutsche Bank: Price Target Nearly Doubles to $441

headline: Wall Street sees new upswing for health insurers after years of margin pressure
summary: Investing.com -- Analysts turned more bullish on the managed care sector, upgrading shares of Humana, Centene, and Elevance Health to “Buy,” while downgrading The Cigna Group to “Hold” on valuation concerns.

headline: Here Are Wednesday’s Top Wall Street Analyst Research Calls: BJ’s Wholesale Club, Centene, Cigna, Crown Castle, ETSY, Franco-Nevada, Humana, Ovintiv, X-Energy, and More
summary: Pre-Market Stock Futures: Futures are trading higher on the heels of the third straight day of stock declines, and there is growing apprehension that yields will go even higher and that inflation may as well. All of the major indices finished Tuesday lower, and with Q1 earnings all but over and the incoming economic data ... headline: Mizuho Maintains Outperform on Humana, Raises Price Target to $335
summary: Mizuho  analyst Ann Hynes   maintains Humana (NYSE:HUM) with a Outperform and raises the price target from $290 to $335.

headline: Deutsche Bank Upgrades Humana to Buy, Raises Price Target to $441
summary: Deutsche Bank  analyst George Hill   upgrades Humana (NYSE:HUM) from Hold to Buy and raises the price target from $235 to $441.

headline: U.S. Health Insurers Raise EPS Estimates After Strong Q1'26, Higher Medicare Rates
summary: Q1 proved to be a boon for many major US managed care insurers, as earnings results exceeded consensus estimates, leading to rises in stock prices and higher full-year earnings estimates.
